creator: nlopes.ml@gmail.com
text:
When trying to compile last.fm using clang it errors out.

Fix: Patch attached


Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Define compiler variables in order to compile in clang:

.if !defined(CC) || ${CC} == "cc"
CC=clang
.endif
.if !defined(CXX) || ${CXX} == "c++"
CXX=clang++
.endif
.if !defined(CPP) || ${CPP} == "cpp"
CPP=clang -E
.endif
NO_WERROR=
WERROR=


cd /usr/ports/audio/last.fm && make clean && make
